name: hare-lsp
description: Language support for Hare via the hare-lsp language server.

commands.title: Open Hare stdlib in New Window

hare-lsp.path.description: Path to the `hare-lsp` language server binary launched by the extension.

hare-lsp.trace.server.description: Trace LSP traffic between the extension and the server in the output channel.

hare.path.description: Path to the `hare` binary used by the language server.

hare.harepath.description: Colon-separated module search paths (overrides $HAREPATH for the language server). Useful when VSCode is launched without inheriting the user's shell environment. Empty falls back to $HAREPATH, then /usr/src/hare/{stdlib,third-party} (distro packages, e.g. Alpine), then /usr/local/src/hare/{stdlib,third-party} (upstream source install).

hare.diagnostics.debounceMs.description: Minimum ms between the last didChange and the next parse-diagnostics refresh.

hare.diagnostics.enableBuild.description: Run `hare build` on save to surface type-check diagnostics.

hare.diagnostics.buildTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wall-clock ms to wait for `hare build` (or `hare test` / `hare run`) before SIGTERM. 0 disables the timeout.

hare.format.indentStyle.description: Tab vs space indent in formatting output.

hare.format.indentWidth.description: Number of spaces per indent level when indentStyle is `space`.

hare.format.trimFinalNewlines.description: Trim trailing whitespace at end of file on save.

hare.format.insertFinalNewline.description: Ensure the file ends with a single newline on save.

hare.inlayHints.parameterNames.description: Show parameter-name hints at call sites.

hare.inlayHints.inferredTypes.description: Show inferred-type hints on let / const bindings.

hare.inlayHints.inferredTypesMaxDepth.description: Maximum recursion depth for inferred-type hints. 0 disables inference beyond declared types + literals; higher values follow function-call return types, identifier bindings, and type aliases. Alias-chain cycles are guarded by a visited set, so larger values are safe.

hare.limits.maxOpenDocuments.description: Maximum number of documents the server will keep open at once.

hare.limits.maxTotalBufferBytes.description: Maximum total bytes summed across all open document buffers (default 256 MiB).

hare.limits.maxPendingRequests.description: Maximum in-flight server-initiated requests awaiting a response.

hare.limits.maxCancelledIds.description: Maximum number of cancelled-but-not-yet-cleared request ids.

hare.limits.maxWorkspaceIndexEntries.description: Maximum workspace-index entries. Whatever you configure is what the server enforces; there is no additional non-configurable ceiling.

hare.limits.maxPendingIndexJobs.description: Maximum concurrent indexing jobs. Coalescing keeps this near 2 in practice (workspace + stdlib); the cap is a defensive ceiling.

scripts.package: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run bundle -- --production && vsce package --allow-missing-repository
